series_metadata.series_title: Litigation reports from the Attorney General''s Office
series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, reports or communication from the Ohio Attorney General''s Office to the Division regarding the status of pending Division cases. This schedule contains confidential information including attorney work product and attorney client communications.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Records maintained in paper form shall be maintained two years from date of receipt by Division. ; Electronic: Any records maintained in machine readable form shall be maintained two years from date of receipt by Division. ; Microform: Any records maintained in microform shall be maintained two years from date of receipt by Division
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Shred
